speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Time for The Scoreboard, and our boys in maroon, blue and gold are doing us proud. <cite index="21-12">Brisbane Lions have seen off North Melbourne to notch their third straight win, holding off the Kangaroos by 26 points at Barossa Park</cite> in the Gather Round.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="22-12">The Lions are the two-time reigning AFL premiers</cite>, and they're looking every bit like they're going for a third consecutive flag. The depth in this team is just incredible.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="26-10,26-11">Will Ashcroft starred with 36 disposals in a midfield masterclass, reinforcing the Lions' depth. Despite Brisbane's dominance including multiple Gather Round wins over North, last year's draw serves as a reminder the gap may be closing</cite>.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] When you've got young guns like Ashcroft playing like seasoned veterans, you know the future's looking bright. That is why we love sport - it brings out the absolute best in people.
